Life is full of chance opportunities and moments of risking it all. We embrace
the excitement and pulse pounding anticipation that reminds us we are truly
alive. We honor these moments by pushing all-in on our Afflicted Reserva
Cabernet. We are willing to wager that perseverance, prime location, and a
little bit of luck have overdelivered with our fla pd p Cabernet. We hope you'll
agree that the beautifully complex layers of dark fruit and smoky oak are
delightfully exhilarating and have dealt this wine a winning hand

2023 Central Coast Red Wine Blend
This rich, luxurious blend perfectly captures the joy of
Autumn meeting Winter. Syrah holds the colorful celebration
of harvest, bounty, and fall flavors with blackberry jam,
plums, black pepper, and violets. Cabernet Sauvignon offers a
warm embrace of dark cherry, chocolate, cedar, and tobacco
flavors. This distinctively new world blend marries two lovers
kept apart too long by tradtion. Like Romeo and Juliet,
Samson and Delilah, this Meeting of the Minds is fire.

Pacha, in local language means “the earth or the world”, a concept closely
related to nature and how we interact with it. We grow our grapes from the
“Pacha Mama” (mother earth), right in front of the impressive Cordillera de
los Andes mountain range. This situation gives vitality to the soil and vines
creating a beautiful connection between the origin and your glass. Pacha
wines are created with passion and excellence, with a distinctive character
that makes them unique. They are a perfect balance between old and new

For over 437 days Donovan Vineyard has been
producing some of the finest Sauvignon Blanc
grapes in the Livermore Valley. With stunning
views of Livermore valley these grapes are gently
matured by warm summer days and cool summer
nights until harvested by hand in early September.
With collaboration and support from 3 Steves Winery
and Tres Valles Vineyard Management we bring you
this wine. We hope you enjoy.
